missionFrame.function: Recover a contested shuttle scene, establish Halden's survival through resilient evidence, and introduce the Gravesend open-world hazard.
missionFrame.dramaticQuestion: Who may be endangered in order to learn what happened to a missing Starfleet officer?

forbiddenOutcomes: end Unseen Border from a single failed check
remove player agency from command decisions
reveal complete hidden truth without evidence

phases.title: Contact in the Veil
phases.summary: A civilian distress trace leads the Aster Vale to Halden's damaged shuttle amid shifting markers and several unacknowledged vessels.
objectives: Identify life signs and immediate hazards
Control approach without escalating every contact
pressures: Civilian craft are already near the shuttle
At least one observer refuses identification
phases.directorPurpose: A civilian distress trace leads the Aster Vale to Halden's damaged shuttle amid shifting markers and several unacknowledged vessels.
playerFacingObjectives: Identify life signs and immediate hazards
Control approach without escalating every contact

phases.title: Rescue Before Evidence
phases.summary: Residual life-support, medical traces, and testimony indicate occupants survived long enough for civilian rescue.
objectives: Separate life safety from evidence custody
pressures: The shuttle may break apart during towing
Witnesses fear Hadran and Black Ledger retaliation
A covert team is moving closer
phases.directorPurpose: Residual life-support, medical traces, and testimony indicate occupants survived long enough for civilian rescue.
playerFacingObjectives: Separate life safety from evidence custody

phases.title: Contested Custody
phases.summary: Starfleet, Hadran, local rescuers, and a covert boarding team each create competing claims over the shuttle and its data.
objectives: Keep the Veil route usable for rescue
pressures: Exclusive custody may require force or sacrifice
phases.directorPurpose: Starfleet, Hadran, local rescuers, and a covert boarding team each create competing claims over the shuttle and its data.
playerFacingObjectives: Keep the Veil route usable for rescue

phases.title: The Distributed Audit
phases.summary: The surviving cache reveals that Halden carried only one fragment of a wider route audit and deliberately separated evidence from witness identities.
objectives: Reconstruct what the cache can prove
Avoid treating missing fields as proof of guilt
Choose what to report and whom to alert
pressures: The cache points toward protected contacts
Hostile actors may infer the same next step
phases.directorPurpose: The surviving cache reveals that Halden carried only one fragment of a wider route audit and deliberately separated evidence from witness identities.
playerFacingObjectives: Reconstruct what the cache can prove
Avoid treating missing fields as proof of guilt
Choose what to report and whom to alert

phases.title: Halden Was Alive
phases.summary: The mission closes with a credible living trail, a transformed evidence scene, and consequences for witnesses, custody, and the Veil.
objectives: Commit the evidence and witness status
Record ship, route, and faction consequences
Choose the next investigation or regional priority
pressures: Evidence is incomplete but sufficient to continue
The campaign now has multiple simultaneous leads
phases.directorPurpose: The mission closes with a credible living trail, a transformed evidence scene, and consequences for witnesses, custody, and the Veil.
playerFacingObjectives: Commit the evidence and witness status
Record ship, route, and faction consequences
Choose the next investigation or regional priority

clocks.label: Chapter 2: Halden's Shuttle Pressure
advanceTriggers: Delay, unresolved hazards, or escalating faction action.

readinessGates.motive: The pressure follows directly from the authored mission situation.
readinessGates.information: The player has visible evidence or can request it.
readinessGates.opportunity: The pressure can surface during a relevant mission scene.
readinessGates.resources: Use only actors, ships, systems, and assets present in committed state.
readinessGates.riskTolerance: Escalate after visible cost, delay, or rejected mitigation.
readinessGates.timing: Advance at scene or mission boundaries.

actionWindow.latestUsefulAction: Before the mission end state is committed.

decisionPoints.title: Rescue and Evidence Priority
decisionPoints.stakes: Survivors; witnesses; shuttle integrity; route safety
decisionPoints.optionsPolicy: Freeform command intent; any listed approaches are examples only.

decisionPoints.title: Halden Evidence Custody
decisionPoints.stakes: Witness exposure; Starfleet review; hostile pursuit; investigation resilience
decisionPoints.optionsPolicy: Freeform command intent; any listed approaches are examples only.

commandDecisions.title: Rescue and Evidence Priority
commandDecisions.awardPolicy: Award when the player makes a clear, costly command judgment about rescue and evidence priority.

commandDecisions.title: Halden Evidence Custody
commandDecisions.awardPolicy: Award when the player makes a clear, costly command judgment about halden evidence custody.
